name: WELL MCP
description: Human readiness — 22 somatic tools. Substrate vitality mirror. W0 Sovereignty: WELL holds a mirror, not a veto.

deprecated_aliases.name: well_readiness
deprecated_aliases.reason: Audit 2026-07-12: was listed in both deprecated_callable and canonical_callable registry buckets; class now explicit DEPRECATED_PUBLIC. Replacement canonical tool covers ZEN single-verdict use case via mode='readiness'.

deprecation_policy.rule: Every deprecated tool must declare replacement + removal date in well-known/mcp/server.json; clients must check deprecated_aliases before resolving a tool name.
